sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: XCEL ENERGY (NYSE: XEL) director granted 580 stock units as board retainer
feed.summary: XCEL ENERGY INC director Charles G. Pardee received a grant of 580.527 stock equivalent units as part of his board compensation, bringing his total direct holdings to 30,940.792 shares-equivalent. These units serve as a quarterly cash retainer, with 483.772 units granted at $78.09 each and an additional 96.775 units as a 20% premium at no cost. The units convert to common stock after his board service ends, with fractional units settled in cash, and also include 118.552 units from dividend reinvestment.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Stock: Leading Life Sciences Provider Faces Mixed Institutional Flows Amid Strong Fundamentals
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific, a global leader in life sciences, reported strong quarterly results in January 2026, beating earnings expectations with significant revenue growth. Despite high institutional ownership and bullish analyst ratings, some investors have trimmed stakes, signaling caution. The company shows strong financials, dividend growth potential, and strategic developments, making it a key play for North American investors in healthcare innovation.

feed.title: CVS Specialty delivers personalized care through 30+ Centers of Excellence
feed.summary: CVS Specialty leverages over 30 condition and therapy-specific Centers of Excellence (CoEs) to provide personalized care for patients with complex, rare, and ultrarare conditions. These CoEs feature specially trained CareTeams, deep clinical expertise, and systems to ensure medication access and support for unpredictable patient needs, as highlighted by the case of a young hemophilia patient. The model aims to simplify care by addressing the unique challenges and varying needs of patients within a broad spectrum of chronic conditions.

feed.title: Packaging Corp (PKG) president granted stock; 12,615 shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Packaging Corp of America (PKG) President Thomas A. Hassfurther reported receiving 29,778 shares from TSR performance units awarded in February 2023, along with 2,279 shares for accumulated dividends. To cover tax obligations, the company withheld 12,615 shares at $212.25 each. After these transactions, Hassfurther directly holds 231,282 shares of PKG common stock.

feed.title: Weyerhaeuser Co Stock: Timber REIT Faces Headwinds but Shows Resilience Amid Institutional Buying an
feed.summary: Weyerhaeuser Co (WY), a timber REIT, is attracting institutional investor confidence despite recent earnings challenges, with Allspring Global Investments increasing its stake. Analysts maintain positive ratings and price targets, anticipating recovery in wood product demand and supported by the company's dividend stability and sustainable forestry practices. The company faces headwinds from fluctuating lumber prices and interest rates, but its integrated business model and significant land holdings provide resilience.

feed.title: Boyd Group Services (TSE:BYD) Insider Brian Kaner Purchases 1,180 Shares
feed.summary: Boyd Group Services (TSE:BYD) Director Brian Kaner recently purchased 1,180 shares of the company's stock at C$173.43 per share, increasing his total holdings by almost 200%. This insider buying occurred as the stock traded below its moving averages and near its 52-week low, despite analysts maintaining a "Buy" rating with a C$263.42 consensus target price. The company reported C$1.24 EPS on C$1.04 billion revenue last quarter.

feed.title: PulteGroup (PHM) Expands Florida Footprint via Strategic Partnership with St. Joe
feed.summary: PulteGroup (PHM), the third-largest homebuilder in the U.S., has announced a strategic partnership with The St. Joe Company (JOE) to develop over 1,300 homesites in Bay County, Florida, marking PulteGroup's first entry into Northwest Florida. This collaboration includes plans for two gated communities within the Pigeon Creek area, with potential expansion to 2,653 units. The news follows Truist initiating coverage on PulteGroup with a Buy rating and a $170 price target, anticipating significant earnings growth in 2027 despite projected industry margin and demand challenges in 2026.

feed.title: Outside Charlotte, Meta + Corning launch 1,000-job data center support project
feed.summary: Corning Inc. and Meta Platforms have announced a $6 billion partnership to expand Corning's optical cable manufacturing facility in the Hickory area, North Carolina. This expansion will create approximately 1,000 new jobs and secure Corning as the primary supplier of fiber optic cables for Meta's AI data centers for the next five years, making the Hickory facility the largest optical cable plant globally. The initiative underscores North Carolina's growing role as a hub for fiber optics and data center infrastructure, crucial for powering artificial intelligence.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Group Inc Stock (GS) Moved Up by 4.95% on Mar 31: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc (GS) stock increased by 4.95% on March 31, driven by favorable regulatory changes, a positive M&A outlook, and strong analyst sentiment. The revised Basel III framework is expected to reduce capital requirements for major banks, while a projected surge in M&A volume for 2026 presents significant revenue opportunities for Goldman Sachs's investment banking division. Analysts have raised earnings expectations, citing the firm's strategic focus on core strengths and integration of AI.

feed.title: TD Cowen Lowers American Express (AXP) Price Target to $330
feed.summary: TD Cowen lowered its price target for American Express (AXP) to $330 from $375, maintaining a Hold rating due to increased macroeconomic uncertainty and competition in auto lending. This adjustment follows a review of American Express's consumer finance group, impacted by AI's effect on employment and geopolitical tensions. American Express also announced a partnership with fashion label STAUD and previously saw Truist lower its price target to $360.

feed.title: Archer-Daniels-Midland Co (ADM) Strengthens Its Board As It Bolsters Its South American Operations
feed.summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Co (ADM) has appointed Michael McMurray to its board of directors, citing his extensive experience in financial and strategic leadership. The company also highlighted its strategic initiatives, including expected benefits from the 45Z biofuel credit and recent improvements to its South American operations, particularly in Brazil. ADM, a global agricultural supply chain manager, also participates in the potash business through an offtake agreement.

feed.title: Affiliate Jennifer Neil plans resale of POOL shares (NASDAQ: POOL)
feed.summary: Jennifer Neil, an affiliate, filed a Form 144 to sell multiple small blocks of Pool Corporation (NASDAQ: POOL) Common Stock acquired through an Employee Stock Purchase Plan. The filing details various lots by grant date, such as 103 shares from 2018 and 72 shares from 2020, and also indicates prior sales of 508 shares on March 24, 2026. This is considered a routine notice for affiliates disposing of securities, with a neutral impact and sentiment according to corporate governance analysts.

feed.title: Public Storage Stock: A Pillar of Stability in the Self-Storage Sector for North American Investors
feed.summary: Public Storage (ISIN: US7453271057) is presented as a leading self-storage REIT offering reliable income streams through its robust portfolio across the U.S. and Europe. The article highlights its market leadership, operational efficiency, strategic growth through acquisitions and new developments, and strong financial health with consistent dividend growth. It positions Public Storage as a defensive investment with inflation-hedging potential, appealing to North American investors seeking stability and income in their portfolios.

feed.title: [ARS] Princeton Bancorp, Inc. SEC Filing
feed.summary: This article reports on an ARS SEC filing by Princeton Bancorp, Inc. (BPRN) on March 31, 2026, at 02:57 PM. The filing is categorized with low impact and neutral sentiment, and is available as a PDF document. The article also provides a stock overview for BPRN, including market cap, float, industry, and recent news and SEC filings.

feed.title: Republic Bank Earns Top 25 Community Bank Recognition from S&P Global Market Intelligence
feed.summary: Republic Bank & Trust Company has been recognized by S&P Global Market Intelligence as a Top 25 Community Bank, ranking 24th nationally among institutions with $3-$10 billion in assets. This marks the third consecutive year Republic has been the highest-ranked bank headquartered in Kentucky. The recognition is based on metrics like returns, growth, funding, and balance sheet strength, reflecting the bank's commitment to disciplined execution and strong financial fundamentals.

feed.title: Super Micro Computer Stock Rises On Middle East Conflict Optimism
feed.summary: Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ: SMCI) stock rose due to optimism regarding a potential de-escalation in the Middle East conflict and reassuring comments from Fed Chair Jerome Powell about "well anchored" inflation expectations. While the stock's intermediate trend remains downwards and technical indicators suggest mixed momentum, its valuation and quality profiles are strong according to Benzinga Edge, indicating potential for longer-term investors if support levels hold.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Co. Expands to Brown County
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Co. announced its expansion into Brown County, Wisconsin, with a new store set to open in Pulaski. This marks the company's first location in the county, aiming to serve local farmers, ranchers, and outdoor enthusiasts with a wide range of agricultural, home improvement, and outdoor living products and services. The store is expected to open in summer 2026, creating new jobs and supporting the local economy.

feed.title: Prudential Financial stock hits 52-week low at $16.57
feed.summary: Prudential Financial's preferred stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $16.57, representing a 5.73% decline over six months, despite the company maintaining a "GOOD" financial health score and a P/E ratio of 9.33. The company recently reported strong Q4 2026 earnings with a $6.6 billion pretax adjusted operating income, but faces challenges in Japan due to suspended sales following employee misconduct, which is expected to impact 2026 financial results. Investors are closely monitoring the company's performance and how it navigates these challenges.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace Stock: Engineered Components Leader in a Booming Aviation Market
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace is a leading supplier of engineered components for commercial and defense aerospace sectors, benefiting from the booming aviation market and increased defense spending. The company, known for its high-margin components and materials science expertise, reported strong financial results and positive outlooks from analysts. North American investors find Howmet Aerospace attractive due to its exposure to global aerospace growth, stable regulations, and strong financial profile, though supply chain disruptions and raw material costs remain potential risks.

feed.title: Salesforce (CRM) Enhances Slack with Docusign Integration
feed.summary: Salesforce (CRM) is integrating Docusign's Intelligent Agreement Management directly into its Slack platform to improve workflow efficiency for teams. This integration will allow users to create and negotiate contracts within Slack. Despite recent stock price fluctuations, Salesforce maintains strong financial health, with robust revenue growth, expanding margins, and an attractive valuation, positioning it well for future growth in the technology sector.

feed.title: Bernstein Maintains Gilead Sciences(GILD.US) With Buy Rating, Raises Target Price to $160
feed.summary: Bernstein has reiterated its Buy rating on Gilead Sciences (GILD.US) and increased its target price to $160. This adjustment likely reflects a positive outlook on the company's financial performance or product pipeline from the analyst firm.

feed.title: Brenmiller Energy Shareholders Approve Sole Agenda Item at Adjourned March 31 Meeting
feed.summary: Brenmiller Energy shareholders approved the sole agenda item at a special general meeting on March 31, 2026, after an initial lack of quorum led to an adjournment. This approval ensures updated disclosures across the company’s SEC registrations. Brenmiller (BNRG) currently holds a Neutral rating from TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, primarily due to weak financial performance and a bearish technical trend, despite a $0.63 price target from analysts.

feed.title: BTCS Inc. Announces Change of Independent Registered Public Accounting Firm in 2026
feed.summary: BTCS Inc. announced a change in its independent registered public accounting firm, dismissing RBSM LLP and appointing Forvis Mazars, LLP for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026. The company stated there were no disagreements or reportable events with the previous firm, RBSM LLP. This decision, made by the Board of Directors and Audit Committee, underscores BTCS's adherence to corporate governance, though investors are advised to monitor future filings for potential impacts.

feed.title: BONK 2025 10-K: $3.93M Revenue, $(17.02) EPS
feed.summary: BONK reported total revenues of $3.93 million for fiscal 2025, a significant increase from $0.70 million in 2024, attributed to recent acquisitions and digital asset income. Despite improved gross profit, the company recorded a net loss of $(68.19) million, driven by substantial operating costs as it transitions towards e-commerce and brand acquisitions. BONK also reported a basic loss per share of $(17.02) for 2025, an improvement from $(31.77) in 2024.

feed.title: Pfizer to close South San Francisco research site (PFE:NYSE)
feed.summary: Pfizer is set to close a research site and an office location in South San Francisco by the end of April, indicating a significant reduction in its presence in the Bay Area's biotech hub. This comes as the company prepares for the closures, as reported by the San Francisco Chronicle.

feed.title: Arch Capital Group stock hits 52-week low at 19.52 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Arch Capital Group Ltd's ADR stock has dropped to a 52-week low of $19.52, reflecting a 5.32% decline over the past year. Despite this, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is undervalued and oversold, trading at a P/E ratio of 8.22 with a high dividend yield of 6.91%. Investors are closely watching the insurance company's performance amidst broader financial market trends.

feed.title: Barclays (ATMP) $757K autocallable notes linked to tech index—matures 2031
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC has priced $757,000 in Autocallable Notes (ATMP) due April 1, 2031, linked to the Barclays US Tech Accelerator 6% Decrement USD ER Index. These notes pay no interest and can be automatically redeemed on observation dates for a capped premium up to 135.00%. If not called, principal repayment at maturity is contingent on the Final Underlier Value relative to a Barrier Value, exposing investors to potential principal loss due to the index's 6% per annum decrement and variable leverage.

feed.title: Applied Materials Inc Stock (AMAT) Moved Up by 4.10% on Mar 31: Facts Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Applied Materials Inc. (AMAT) stock rose 4.10% on March 31, driven by strong Q1 FY26 results, a 15% dividend increase, and positive analyst upgrades. The company's strategic focus on AI-related growth segments, including new R&D partnerships and high demand for wafer equipment, along with significant institutional investor interest, contributed to the upward movement despite some noted risks.

feed.title: Banco BBVA Argentina (BBAR) risk director files Form 3 with no trades
feed.summary: Gerardo Mario Fiandrino, Director Risks for Banco BBVA Argentina S.A. (BBAR), has filed an initial statement of beneficial ownership (Form 3) with the SEC. The filing indicates no reported transactions, no share purchases or sales, and no derivative positions, serving primarily as an administrative disclosure of his insider status. This neutral filing simply establishes his official position as an insider of the company.

feed.title: Banner Corporation Announces First Quarter 2026 Conference Call
feed.summary: Banner Corporation, the parent company of Banner Bank, announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results and host a conference call on April 22, 2026. This announcement is significant for investors and analysts who monitor the company's performance and the broader banking industry. The report will provide insights into Banner Corporation's financial health as a publicly traded regional bank holding company.

feed.title: Eli Lilly announces $7-billion merger, with eye on wakefulness drugs
feed.summary: Eli Lilly has announced a $7-billion merger with Centessa, a biotech company specializing in wakefulness drugs. This acquisition aims to strengthen Eli Lilly's focus on neurological disorders, particularly narcolepsy, with potential future applications for sleepiness associated with diseases like Alzheimer's. The deal involves an initial payment of $6.3 billion to Centessa, with an additional $1.5 billion contingent on U.S. drug approval.

feed.title: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (CF) Drops 6.2% to $128.95
feed.summary: CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (CF) stock dropped 6.2% to $128.95 on Tuesday, driven by significant insider selling totaling $53.2 million over the past month. Despite the sharp decline and high trading volume, analyst sentiment remains neutral with no recent rating cuts, suggesting that Wall Street may not view the insider sales as a bearish fundamental signal. Investors are advised to monitor future insider transactions and company communications regarding sales and fertilizer market trends.

feed.title: Walmart Digital Price Tags Coming to All U.S. Stores in 2026
feed.summary: Walmart plans to install digital price tags in all its U.S. stores by the end of 2026, a transition that began two years ago. While Walmart states this aims to simplify operations and unify pricing, customers express concerns about dynamic pricing and issues with the tags themselves. The company denies plans for dynamic pricing for customers and assures that price updates are human-led and maintain their "Everyday Low Price" promise.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific Introduces Glacios 3 Cryo-TEM for Structural Biology Labs
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific has launched the Glacios 3 Cryo-TEM, a new 200 kV cryogenic transmission electron microscope designed to make advanced structural biology tools more accessible to laboratories. This instrument integrates AI-powered software and a flexible installation system, the READY System, to enhance throughput, data quality, and ease of use while reducing facility constraints. The Glacios 3 Cryo-TEM aims to empower more institutions and researchers to leverage cryo-EM for complex biological questions and therapeutic development.

feed.title: [Form 3] Ads-Tec Energy Public Ltd Co Initial Statement of Beneficial Ownership
feed.summary: Ads-Tec Energy Public Ltd Co director Andreas Fabritius has filed an initial statement of beneficial ownership (Form 3), disclosing a direct holding of 22,257 ordinary shares. These shares include restricted stock units (RSUs) granted under the company's 2021 Omnibus Incentive Plan, some of which are already vested and others will vest in the future. The filing details the vesting schedule of these RSUs.

feed.title: A $6B AI buildout could lift Corning jobs 15%-20% in North Carolina
feed.summary: Corning Incorporated and Meta Platforms, Inc. have broken ground on a significant expansion of Corning's optical cable manufacturing capacity in Hickory, North Carolina. This expansion supports a multiyear, up to $6 billion agreement where Corning will supply Meta with advanced optical fiber, cable, and connectivity solutions for AI data centers. The project is expected to increase Corning's employment in North Carolina by 15% to 20% and reinforces the state's role as a manufacturing hub for optical technology.

feed.title: AMTD owned Global Art Media - The Art Newspaper Officially Registered in Hong Kong with the Government and Launches Its Inaugural Hong Kong Edition
authors: AMTD Digital; AMTD IDEA Group; The Generation Essentials Group
feed.summary: AMTD Group, AMTD IDEA Group, AMTD Digital Inc., and The Generation Essentials Group announced that "The Art Newspaper" has been officially registered in Hong Kong and launched its inaugural Hong Kong edition during Art Basel Hong Kong 2026. This follows AMTD's 2023 acquisition of The Art Newspaper and the expiration of the previous licensing agreement. The registration also paves the way for the upcoming launch of The Art Newspaper China in October, both produced and published by AMTD directly.

feed.title: Golden Pass LNG starts producing after QatarEnergy and Exxon's Middle East facilities shut down
feed.summary: The Golden Pass LNG project, a joint venture between Exxon Mobil Corp. and QatarEnergy in Sabine Pass, Texas, has commenced production from its first LNG train. This development follows previous contracting challenges and shutdowns at other facilities owned by the companies in the Middle East. QatarEnergy holds a 70% stake in Golden Pass LNG, while Exxon owns the remaining 30%.

feed.title: International Paper plans $225m Mississippi plant
feed.summary: International Paper announced plans to invest $225 million in a new 468,000-square-foot corrugated packaging facility in Brandon, Mississippi. This new plant will replace an older facility nearby, aiming to modernize its manufacturing footprint, improve efficiency, and strengthen service capabilities in the Mid-South region. Construction is expected to start in June with operations by the fourth quarter of 2027.

feed.title: F5 BIG-IP APM systems vulnerable to critical remote code execution flaw | brief | SC Media
feed.summary: A severe security flaw in F5's BIG-IP APM systems, initially underestimated as a denial-of-service issue, has been reclassified as a critical remote code execution (RCE) threat with a severity score of 9.8 out of 10. The vulnerability, CVE-2025-53521, allows attackers to gain complete control of affected servers without authentication by planting malware. F5 has released indicators of compromise, urging customers to patch immediately or rebuild systems if a compromise is suspected.

feed.title: Blackstone Dumps Spanish Rental Portfolio In $1.4 Billion Brookfield Deal
feed.summary: Blackstone has agreed to sell its entire Fidere residential rental portfolio in Spain to Brookfield Asset Management Inc. for a gross 1.2 billion euros ($1.4 billion). This transaction, valued at a net 1.05 billion euros, includes approximately 5,000 units across 47 buildings in Madrid, marking the largest multifamily deal in Spain since the 2007–2009 financial crisis, excluding Blackstone's acquisition of Testa Homes. Additionally, Blackstone recently participated in a consortium acquiring the Royal Challengers Bengaluru cricket franchise for an estimated $1.78 billion, aligning with its strategy of investing in high-growth sports franchises.

feed.title: AI Startup “Upstage” in Talks to Purchase 10,000 Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) Chips in Korea
feed.summary: South Korean AI startup Upstage is in discussions with Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) to acquire 10,000 MI355 AI accelerators, aiming to enhance its domestic compute capacity and diversify from Nvidia. This move supports Upstage's participation in a government-backed contest to develop national AI foundation models. Meanwhile, AMD anticipates first-quarter revenue of approximately $9.8 billion, including $100 million from China-related AI chip sales.

feed.title: Broadcom Inc Stock (AVGO) Moved Up by 4.58% on Mar 31: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) saw its stock rise by 4.58% due to strong Q1 FY26 earnings, exceeding expectations with robust AI revenue guidance. The company launched new AI infrastructure and cybersecurity products and secured a significant government contract, leading to positive analyst upgrades. Despite some technical sell signals and low media coverage, Broadcom is positioned favorably within the AI-driven semiconductor industry, though it faces risks like insider selling and supply bottlenecks.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc Class A Stock (GOOGL) Moved Up by 4.23% on Mar 31: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. Class A stock (GOOGL) rose by 4.23% on March 31, driven by the announcement of "TurboQuant," an AI memory-compression algorithm, and the acquisition of cloud and AI security platform Wiz. Analysts have reiterated "Buy" ratings with increased price targets, signaling confidence despite ongoing antitrust scrutiny and geopolitical threats. Technical indicators, however, suggest caution with sell signals from MACD, RSI, and Williams %R.

feed.title: Is NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) one of the Best Goldman Sachs AI Stocks: Top 12 Stocks to Buy?
feed.summary: NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) is highlighted as a top Goldman Sachs AI stock, actively innovating in the AI computing space. The company recently launched a Language Processing Unit, unveiled new rack systems, and introduced NemoClaw, a business AI platform, indicating significant advancements. CEO Jensen Huang projects substantial revenue from new chips by 2027, emphasizing the company's commitment to meeting the escalating demands of agentic AI workloads despite limited recent stock movement.

feed.title: Basin Electric, NextEra Energy hold open house to discuss data center
feed.summary: Basin Electric and NextEra Energy hosted an open house in Stanton, ND, to address community concerns regarding a proposed hyper-scale data center and gas power plant. The projects, which would require significant land and create 280-535 permanent jobs, face community skepticism despite company assurances. Residents expressed frustration over a lack of clear answers and called for more transparency and continued discussions.

feed.title: Packaging Corp of America (PKG) CEO gets equity awards and tax share withholding
feed.summary: Mark W. Kowlzan, Chairman & CEO of Packaging Corp of America (PKG), received 43,010 shares from TSR performance units and 3,292 shares from accumulated dividend equivalents, with performance units paying out at 200%. To cover withholding taxes, 20,513 shares were withheld by the company at $212.25 per share. After these transactions, Kowlzan directly holds 482,876 shares of common stock, along with indirect holdings in a 401(k) plan and shares held by his spouse (beneficial ownership disclaimed).

feed.title: BIO-key anticipates Q1 2026 revenue of approximately $2.2M, targeting breakeven and profitability in 2026
feed.summary: BIO-key anticipates reporting approximately $2.2 million in revenue for Q1 2026. The company is actively working towards achieving breakeven and profitability throughout 2026, building on a strong close to Q4 2025. This outlook suggests a positive trend for BIO-key's financial performance.

feed.title: DuPont de Nemours, Inc. (NYSE:DD) Short Interest Update
feed.summary: DuPont de Nemours (NYSE:DD) experienced a 14.6% decrease in short interest during March, reducing the total to 7,417,252 shares. The company surpassed quarterly EPS estimates and provided strong FY2026 guidance, leading several analysts to raise price targets, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating. Institutional investors have also shown increased confidence, with many modifying their holdings.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands Corp (LVS) Stock Price Up 3.04% on Mar 31
feed.summary: Shares of Las Vegas Sands Corp (LVS) increased by 3.04% in mid-day trading on March 31, reaching $53.19. Wall Street analysts have an average target price of $69.95 for LVS, implying a 31.51% upside, with an "Outperform" consensus recommendation. GuruFocus estimates the fair value (GF Value) at $71.52, suggesting a 34.46% upside from the current price.
